zh.lifeSummary: Emma Dayrell是Henry Dayrell和Jane De Samford的女兒，於1226年出生在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾利林斯同 代雷爾。她於1244年與Richard de la Brookes在英國爾麗頓 白 內斯頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Emma
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, originally a short form of compound names such as Ermintrude containing the word erm(en), irm(en) ‘entire’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, but its popularity in medieval England was greatly enhanced by the fact that it had been borne by the mother of Edward the Confessor, herself a Norman. In modern times, it was only in moderate use early in the 20th century but rose sharply in favour in the 1970s and has since remained perennially popular.

en.lifeSummary: Emma Dayrell was born in 1226, in Lillingstone Dayrell, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom as the daughter of Henry Dayrell and Jane De Samford. She married Richard de la Brookes in 1244, in Leighton by Neston, Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons.

ko.Leighton, Cheshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 레이턴 비 네스턴
ko.lifeSummary: Emma Dayrell(은)는 1226년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 릴링스톤 데이렐에서 Henry Dayrell(와)과 Jane De Samford의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1244년 영국 체실르 레이턴 비 네스턴에서 Richard de la Brookes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다.

ru.Leighton, Cheshire, England: лиитон би нестон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Emma Dayrell родилась в 1226 г. в местности лиллингстоун деирелл, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. Её родителей звали Henry Dayrell и Jane De Samford. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard de la Brookes в 1244 г. в местности лиитон би нестон, чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына.
